title: ClockStopper
description: A fabric mod that stops the game's tick cycle when no players are online.
body:
A fabric mod that stops the game's tick cycle when no players are online. This allows the server to use practically zero system resources when no players are online.

## Pros
- Less server-side CPU usage when no players are online

## Cons
- Farms will not run and crops will not grow when no players are online, even in the spawn chunks.

**NOTE:** This mod will ONLY load on DEDICATED SERVERS. This mod will not be loaded on the client.
